title: The Bangladesh Laws (Revision And Declaration) Act, 1973
title_en: The Bangladesh Laws (Revision And Declaration) Act, 1973
description: An Act to revise the laws in force in Bangladesh and make certain declarations in this regard in order to enable the same to be printed. WHEREAS it is expedient to the end that Bangladesh laws may be known in their true form, that the [laws] in force in the territories now comprised in Bangladesh as adapted, modified or amended since the 26th day of March, 1971, and all President’s Orders promulgated since that da...

provisions.title: 1. 6A
provisions.content:
[6A. (1) In addition to the printing of Bangladesh Code in the manner as referred to in section 6, the Bangladesh Code so printed, may also be made available in digitized form through Read Only Memory (ROM) like Compact Disc (CD), Digital Versatile Disc (DVD), etc. with necessary security measures against likely tampering or unauthorized change in the documents.
(2) Bangladesh Code may also be made available through website.
(3) Acts of Parliament, Ordinances and President's Orders may also be made available through website under the name and style of Laws of Bangladesh and such laws shall be updated from time to time.
(4) In case of any doubt or discrepancy about the authenticity of the printed text and electronically printed digitized text, the text of original gazette shall prevail.]
